---
title: "Other Publications"
---

-   Mark, Skip and **Mary Lind**. 2023. ["A Problem of Our Own Making: Understanding Child Labor in the United States."](https://verfassungsblog.de/a-problem-of-our-own-making/) *VerfBlog*, May 13.

-   **Lind, Mary**. 2021. ["Three candidates for Lieutenant Governor of R.I. hope to bring something new to the role: Youth."](https://www.bostonglobe.com/2021/03/03/metro/three-candidates-lieutenant-governor-ri-hope-bring-something-new-role-youth/) *The Boston Globe*, March 3.
